channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rahul Gandhi condemns BJP Gujarat chief for alleged sexist remark against Congress MP Geniben Thakor
item.description: In a strong statement on social media, Leader of Opposition in Lok Sabha, Rahul Gandhi, criticised Gujarat BJP President Jagdish Vishwakarma for allegedly making a derogatory comment about Congress MP...

item.title: First Direct US-Venezuela Flight in Seven Years Marks Thawing Relations
item.description: For the first time in seven years, direct flights between the United States and Venezuela have resumed, symbolising a significant shift in diplomatic relations. This historic flight, operated by Ameri...

item.title: Juliet Stevenson on Career, Personal Life and Reflections on Age
item.description: Juliet Stevenson, the acclaimed British actor born in Essex, reflects on her life, career, and personal experiences in a candid interview. At 69, Stevenson has a distinguished career in film and theat...

item.title: Exploring the Botanical and Emotional Art of Tania Yakunova
item.description: Tania Yakunova, a Kyiv-born illustrator now based in London, creates art that blends human figures with plant life, producing a unique visual language of longing and memory. Her illustrations use grap...

item.title: Princess Charlotte Enjoys Beach Holiday and Family Dog Otto on Her 11th Birthday
item.description: Prince William and Princess Kate recently shared a delightful video celebrating their daughter Princess Charlotte's 11th birthday. The short clip provides a glimpse into the young royal's family holid...

item.title: San Francisco Artist Confirms Viral Polycule Flyers Were Satirical
item.description: In San Francisco, a series of flyers claiming to recruit new members for a 'polycule' went viral, sparking widespread online discussion. The flyers, posted in small numbers by artist and tech worker D...

item.title: IEBC Adds Over 2.3 Million New Voters Nationwide with Nairobi Leading
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) has wrapped up its month-long mass voter registration exercise, adding 2,345,476 new voters to the national roll as of April 28, 2026. Nairob...

item.title: Odisha 10th Result 2026 Declared With 95.33% Pass Percentage
item.description: Board of Secondary Education (BSE), Odisha has declared the Odisha 10th result for the year 2026, with an overall pass percentage of 95.33 percent. Over five lakh students have appeared for the Madhya...

item.title: Affordable Mother’s Day gift ideas across beauty, fashion, home, and wellness categories
item.description: This Global News Curator guide highlights a curated selection of 25 Mother’s Day gift ideas, all priced under $100, aimed at offering thoughtful yet affordable options across multiple categories. The ...

item.title: High Court Dismisses Green Planet Initiative Case Against Earthbanc Over Project Dispute
item.description: The High Court in Eldoret has officially dismissed the case that Green Planet Initiative 2050 Foundation filed against Earthbanc AB concerning the Regeneration Kenya Project. The court ruled in favour...

item.title: Cyclist seriously injured after colliding with illegally dumped rubbish; offender sentenced
item.description: A cyclist has sustained a serious head injury after colliding with rubbish that had been illegally dumped on a road. The incident prompted a police investigation which led to the identification and su...

item.title: McLaughlin-Phillips shines as Reds defeat Brumbies and make Wallabies case
item.description: Harry McLaughlin-Phillips has made a strong case for a Wallabies debut after a commanding performance for the Queensland Reds against the Brumbies, helping secure a 30-21 victory. The 22-year-old five...

item.title: Workers Struggle with Rising Living Costs and Job Insecurity in South Africa
item.description: In South Africa, Workers' Day has highlighted the severe financial pressure facing working-class households. Trade unions report that over the past five years, electricity prices have increased by 68%...

item.title: President Ruto Honours Sebastian Sawe for Historic Sub-Two-Hour London Marathon
item.description: In Nairobi, President William Ruto celebrated Kenyan marathon runner Sebastian Sawe for making history at the London Marathon. Sawe became the first athlete ever to finish the 42-kilometre race in und...

item.title: Iran submits revised proposal for US negotiations in Pakistan amid Hormuz Strait tensions
item.description: According to a report by The Wall Street Journal, Iran has shown flexibility by submitting a revised proposal to the United States for reviving stalled negotiations. The new plan suggests discussing c...

item.title: Governor Peter Mbah’s Infrastructure and Economic Initiatives in Enugu State
item.description: This article highlights the achievements of Governor Peter Mbah in Enugu State and how him dey position the state as a model for the entire South-East region. Under him leadership, Enugu don construct...

item.title: Three UNICROSS Students and Staff Member Killed in Road Accident Along Calabar–Itu Highway
item.description: The University of Cross River State (UNICROSS) don announce say three students plus one staff member don die for road accident along Calabar–Itu Highway. The accident happen while dem dey return from ...

item.title: Parliament Inspects Prasa’s Train Refurbishment Progress at YNF Facility
item.description: Following concerns about delays in Prasa’s general overhaul (GO) programme, Parliament’s portfolio committee on transport recently conducted an on-site inspection at YNF’s Isando rail refurbishment fa...

item.title: Tanzania's Mining Sector Urged to Strengthen Safety and Mental Health Support
item.description: Mining stakeholders in Tanzania are calling for the implementation of stronger safety systems in the sector, especially in regard to addressing physical and psychosocial risks faced by workers. This c...

item.title: Elon Musk accuses Sam Altman of diverting OpenAI from its nonprofit mission in major court case
item.description: Elon Musk has accused fellow OpenAI co‑founder Sam Altman of trying to effectively take control of what started as a charity‑focused nonprofit, during the opening stages of a high‑stakes civil trial i...
